SAFE HIGH-LEVEL ACCESS

Chimney Scaffolding

Secure, stable scaffolding for chimney stack repairs, cowl installations, and leadwork. Safety even at the highest peaks.

Precision Stack Access

Chimney work requires specialized scaffolding that provides a stable working platform around the stack without putting undue pressure on your roof. SWP Scaffolding designs custom access solutions for even the most difficult-to-reach chimneys.

Our Chimney Solutions:

  • 🏢 **Saddle Scaffolds**: Stable platforms built over the ridge for twin-sided access.
  • 🏠 **Stack Wraps**: Full 360-degree access for comprehensive re-pointing.
  • 📍 **Roof Ladders & Stages**: Securely anchored systems for quick repairs.
  • 📜 **Safety Handrails**: Full fall protection for roofers and builders.

Ideal For:

  • • Chimney Stack Re-pointing
  • • Flue & Cowl Installation
  • • Lead Flashing Repairs
  • • Aerial & Satellite Work
  • • Pot Replacements
Get a Chimney Quote

Trusted by Local Trades

We work closely with roofers and chimney sweeps to provide the exact access they need to complete their work safely and efficiently.

Fast Strike

We strike chimney scaffolds quickly once the work is done to minimize exposure.

Total Safety

Rigorous checks to ensure no damage to tiles or structural masonry.
